description_long: This is a structured, barrel-shaped handbag crafted from blue leather or faux leather, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The bag has two sturdy, rounded handles attached with matching blue leather tabs and silver-tone hardware. A prominent metallic brand plaque is centered on the front, adding a touch of sophistication. The top of the bag is secured with a full-length zipper, which is visible from the side views and runs the entire length of the top panel. The sides are clean and unadorned, emphasizing the bag's sleek, modern silhouette. The overall design is minimalistic yet elegant, suitable for urban environments and daily use.
description: A structured blue leather handbag with rounded handles, a metallic brand plaque, and a full-length top zipper. The design is sleek, minimal, and modern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic brand plaque, two rounded handles, and clean blue leather surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full-length zipper and the attachment points of the handles, with no visible decorative elements.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front but without the brand plaque, showing the same handle and tab structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the zipper and handle attachments, identical to the other side.
attribute_brand_logo: Rectangular metallic plaque on the front center, engraved with brand text, attached with four visible screws.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, rounded handles, fixed length, attached with blue leather tabs and metal hardware; no shoulder or crossbody strap visible.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Full-length zipper closure on the top panel, with metal teeth and pull tab.
attribute_decorative_elements: Metallic brand plaque on the front; silver-tone hardware on handles and zipper.
